'''Shoo bread''' was a type of [[Bread/Legends|bread]] found on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="Rogue Planet" /> By [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]],<ref name="Date note">''[[Rogue Planet]]'' mentions that [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] [[Chef/Legends|cooked]] shoo [[Bread/Legends|bread]] a few [[Standard month/Legends|months]] prior to the novel's main events. Since ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''Rogue Planet'' to [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]], Yoda and Kenobi must have cooked shoo [[Foodstuff/Legends|bread]] by that [[Standard year/Legends|year]].</ref> the [[Yoda's species/Legends|alien]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] and [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], who were [[Jedi/Legends|members]] of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] on Coruscant, [[Chef/Legends|cooked]] shoo [[Foodstuff/Legends|bread]] and [[wurr]] over a charcoal [[Fire/Legends|fire]] in [[Yoda's quarters/Legends|Yoda's quarters]] of the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]].<ref name="Rogue Planet" />

==Behind the scenes==
Shoo bread was mentioned in the [[2000]] novel ''[[Rogue Planet]]'', written by [[Greg Bear]].<ref name="Rogue Planet" />
